element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic; players practice directional whip use against basic enemies
Defensive tool for blocking projectiles; introduces resource management through whip control
Navigation over wide gaps; early introduction to whip's secondary use beyond combat

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Early levels (dropped from candles and enemies)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Heart resource consumption; players learn weapon selection and planning
Incremental power progression; two upgrade levels increase whip length and damage
Secondary weapon enhancement; extends resource value
Navigation control; allows accessing lower areas and ducking under obstacles
Vertical level progression; reduced movement speed increases challenge pacing
Spatial disorientation; requires camera awareness and upward navigation under pressure
Timing-based platforming; introduces crush hazards and collision complexity
Resource loops; teaches breakable block exploration and enemy defeat rewards

element_introduction_order.element: Boss encounters with weak point discovery
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Early bosses are deliberately easier to teach pattern recognition without punishment

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating boss and receiving Magic Crystal health restoration
Finding food in candles or breakable blocks
Successfully swinging across a gap using rings
Reaching stable ground after vertical scrolling section
typical_tension_triggers: Entering vertical scrolling rooms with enemies
Loss of health without nearby food
Boss patterns with multiple attack phases
Wide gaps requiring precise ring grappling
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Early bosses teach weak points with reduced difficulty; mid-game introduces vertical navigation and moving hazards; late-game combines vertical sections with dense enemy/hazard placement. Tension builds through level progression with timed relief at boss checkpoints.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Candles and breakable blocks contain optional food and weapon pickups; not all breakable blocks are necessary for progression
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Rings serve dual purpose: navigation grapple points and potential secret reach locations via suspended positioning exploit

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-paced; Level 1 (Stables) introduces whip mechanics with basic enemies; early bosses designed to be easier so players discover weak points without retry frustration
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Complexity spike with vertical scrolling rooms (Level 3-2) and moving block hazards (Level 4-4); ring grappling becomes mandatory; secondary weapon selection becomes strategic
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense enemy placement combined with vertical navigation and moving platforms; final levels test mastery of whip control, ring swinging, and boss pattern recognition
notable_spikes: Dungeon stage (blood/acid pools with spike hazards; regional differences: blood becomes green/acid in international versions)

notable_level_patterns.description: Sequences requiring multiple successive ring grapples over wide or hazardous areas; tests player's ability to chain grapple momentum and directional control
Rooms where camera scrolls vertically, creating navigation puzzle with visibility limitation; early camera scroll can be triggered via damage to reveal hidden ring positions
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 3-2 (Cave), Level A-2 (Castle area with moving gears)

notable_level_patterns.description: Platforms that move horizontally or vertically, requiring precise timing and collision management; can crush player if caught between block and ceiling unless invincible-framed
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 4-4 (documented as containing rising platform series)

notable_level_patterns.description: Boss battles where player discovers effective weapon/strategy through trial; earlier bosses have clearer weak points; later bosses have more complex multi-phase patterns
Scattered destructible blocks containing food, weapons, and Double/Triple Shot multipliers; encourages active destruction beyond minimum progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout all levels; particularly The Dungeon and Treasury stages
